name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 30, max 100. Billed per result.

name: cursor
label: Cursor
help: Pagination cursor (page number as string). Leave empty for the first page; then pass the nextCursor value returned in the previous response.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
